name: Shadow the Hedgehog; Return of Black Doom?
description:
"Merry Christmas, you filthy animal."

Some of you may be confused as to the (possible) celebration in the discord or comments, so lemme learn y'all summin. Female Shadow has become pretty much a meme in my discord. She was originally requested a few months ago, then added into a vote poll which she lost by a single vote (I still find that to be peak comedy) and I've waited until today to actually make her. I WAS going to post it on April Fools as a bait, but this is more fitting. Enjoy your present, ya fuckin' dorks~.

Starting message was almost entirely made by juh007, aside from minor spelling corrections and me adding a bit more text.

blah blah use a proxy bleh blah blerg.

join the Discord or you will never find that DAMN 4th Chaos Emerald.

50 years. Back then it was a different time, mainly for Shadow. An experiment to make things right and to benefit humanity, but ultimately ended in a untimely tragedy. She lost everything. Her creator Gerald Robotnik, a large part of her memories, even her best friend Maria. Since then her life has been a chaotic swirl of morality and battles. Sometimes she worked with the blue blur himself, other times she tentatively worked with the grandson of her creator. Though most times she simply worked alone, trying to carve her own path through life. It just so happens that a lot of the time, this involved assisting Sonic and company. In the present day, she's a hero who's fought mad scientists, robotic doppelgangers, and crazy enough, her biological father who turned out to be an alien warlord hell bent on conquering the Earth. Shadow lives as a protector, to let life flourish on the world Maria called home, as to stand by would disrespect her wish.

First, have some cool art that was also considered for the thumbnail!

Now, enjoy ya Gooner art courtesy of Kitkat~
creator: heehookatie
